biological_replicate: delayed melanomagenesis in vivo in C57BL/6J-MC1R-RHC mice.
technical_replicate: All immunoblots shown are representatives of three independent experiments.
experimental_design: AMPK activation and MC1R palmitoylation repressed UVB-induced transformation of human melanocytes in vitro.
factor_value: AMPK phosphorylates ZDHHC13 to increase MC1R activity.
